query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employee_game_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  gameId INT,
  gameSlug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  gameName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  startTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  endTime TIMESTAMP,
  durationMinutes INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  sessionType ENUM('solo_practice', 'team_battle', 'house_championship', 'laws_tournament', 'training') DEFAULT 'solo_practice' NOT NULL,
  won BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  score INT DEFAULT 0,
  difficulty VARCHAR(20),
  countsTowardRequirement BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  weekNumber INT NOT NULL,
  weekYear INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS weekly_game_requirements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  weekNumber INT NOT NULL,
  weekYear INT NOT NULL,
  weekStartDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  weekEndDate TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  requiredMinutes INT DEFAULT 300 NOT NULL,
  completedMinutes INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  complianceStatus ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'exceeded', 'excused') DEFAULT 'not_started' NOT NULL,
  bonusTokensAwarded INT DEFAULT 0,
  streakWeeks INT DEFAULT 0,
  uniqueGamesPlayed INT DEFAULT 0,
  managerNotes TEXT,
  excuseReason TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS team_game_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  gameId INT,
  gameSlug VARCHAR(100),
  scheduledStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  scheduledEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  durationMinutes INT NOT NULL,
  eventType ENUM('team_battle', 'house_championship', 'laws_tournament', 'training_session', 'casual_play') NOT NULL,
  departmentId INT,
  houseId INT,
  entityId INT,
  maxParticipants INT,
  minParticipants INT DEFAULT 2,
  isRequired BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  isRecurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  recurrencePattern VARCHAR(50),
  recurrenceEndDate TIMESTAMP,
  parentEventId INT,
  status ENUM('scheduled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled' NOT NULL,
  winningTeam VARCHAR(255),
  winningHouse INT,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS team_event_participants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  eventId INT NOT NULL,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  rsvpStatus ENUM('pending', 'accepted', 'declined', 'tentative') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  rsvpAt TIMESTAMP,
  attended BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  checkInTime TIMESTAMP,
  checkOutTime TIMESTAMP,
  minutesParticipated INT DEFAULT 0,
  teamName VARCHAR(100),
  teamColor VARCHAR(20),
  individualScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  wasOnWinningTeam BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gaming_leaderboards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  leaderboardType ENUM('individual', 'team', 'house', 'entity') NOT NULL,
  period ENUM('weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly', 'all_time') NOT NULL,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP,
  userId INT,
  departmentId INT,
  houseId INT,
  entityId INT,
  gameId INT,
  gameSlug VARCHAR(100),
  `rank` INT NOT NULL,
  previousRank INT,
  rankChange INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalMinutesPlayed INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalGamesPlayed INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalWins INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalScore INT DEFAULT 0,
  winRate DECIMAL(5,2),
  complianceRate DECIMAL(5,2),
  streakWeeks INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gaming_compliance_reports (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reportType ENUM('individual', 'department', 'house', 'entity', 'system') NOT NULL,
  departmentId INT,
  houseId INT,
  entityId INT,
  periodType ENUM('weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly') NOT NULL,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  totalEmployees INT DEFAULT 0,
  compliantEmployees INT DEFAULT 0,
  nonCompliantEmployees INT DEFAULT 0,
  excusedEmployees INT DEFAULT 0,
  complianceRate DECIMAL(5,2),
  totalMinutesPlayed INT DEFAULT 0,
  averageMinutesPerEmployee INT DEFAULT 0,
  totalTeamEventsHeld INT DEFAULT 0,
  averageEventAttendance DECIMAL(5,2),
  topPerformers JSON,
  reportFileUrl VARCHAR(500),
  generatedBy INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
